old_value: {"id":"smallhold-naww.7","title":"PASSKEY_TOKENS in-memory HashMap lost on restart","description":"File: src/webauthn.rs:PASSKEY_TOKENS. The one-time passkey tokens are stored in a static HashMap. If the server restarts between the WebAuthn ceremony completion and the OAuth form submit (within 2 minutes), the token is lost and login fails silently. This is probably fine for a single-instance server with a 2-minute TTL, but the failure mode is non-obvious — add a comment noting this tradeoff.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:39:59.972166165Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T22:39:59.972166165Z","labels":["readability","review"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"smallhold-naww.7","depends_on_id":"smallhold-naww","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:39:59.999449647Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
